statement: Reviewed the merge-authorization gate including the ancestor-based fix (commit 2e568ab), which was needed after the first version proved unsatisfiable in a live test on this same PR. Understand the fix: an authorized commit may be followed only by bookkeeping commits touching operations/merge_authorizations/, never substantive content. Authorize merging this exact commit into main.
non_claims: This authorization covers only commit 2e568abea9d43685469dd8850e6e4dd33cdb586d; any new substantive commit requires a new authorization file.
This does not certify the workflow logic is bug-free beyond the local and live test cases already run — only that the operator reviewed and approved this exact commit.
